title: urceola polyneura
intro: Urciola polyneura, also known as the Urceola plant, is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, Urceola polyneura has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough, and treating respiratory issues. Urceola polyneura is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
